hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$(basename "$f")" in .env.example) ;; .env|.env.*) printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Editing .env files is blocked: they may contain secrets. Edit .env.example instead."}}';; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) out=$(cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then jq -n --arg r "$out" '{decision:"block",reason:("tsc --noEmit reported type errors after the edit:\n"+$r)}'; fi;; esac
